CREATE TABLE mixed_table (A INT, B INT);
INSERT INTO mixed_table VALUES (1, NULL), (NULL, 2), (3, 4), (NULL, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM test_table WHERE X IS NOT NULL ORDER BY X) AS subquery;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM test_table WHERE X IS NULL ORDER BY X) AS subquery;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM (SELECT X FROM test_table) AS inner_subquery ORDER BY X) AS outer_subquery;
CREATE TABLE join_table1 (id INT, value INT);
CREATE TABLE join_table2 (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(value) FROM join_table1 JOIN join_table2 ON join_table1.id = join_table2.ref_id WHERE join_table1.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(description) FROM join_table2 WHERE ref_id IS NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(X) FROM (SELECT X FROM (SELECT NULL AS X) AS subquery) AS outer_subquery;
